profileNavigationDetail: Open any public profile section without leaving the Studio workspace.

runtime.loadErrorDetail: This workspace could not be loaded. Navigation and preferences are still available.

dashboard.emptyDescription: Adjust the search or status filter to see workstreams.

welcome.title: Start here
welcome.description: A practical index of my setup notes, reusable workflows, delivery checklists, and visual system maps.

ai-agent-setup.title: AI Setup
ai-agent-setup.description: Working notes for AI tools, MCP integrations, and a safe new-machine setup.

ai-skills.title: AI Skills
ai-skills.description: Reusable instructions for focused work with Codex, Claude, Gemini, Antigravity, and other AI tools.

delivery-checklists.title: Engineering Checklists
delivery-checklists.description: Practical checklists for understanding a task, making a change, reviewing it, and releasing it safely.

flow-system-design.title: System Design Flow
flow-system-design.description: A shareable system design path from vague prompt to architecture trade-offs, failure modes, and evolution plan.

flow-architecture-decision.title: Architecture Decision Flow
flow-architecture-decision.description: A lightweight RFC/ADR flow for choosing between options with clear trade-offs, risk gates, and rollback.

flow-incident-response.title: Incident Response Flow
flow-incident-response.description: A production incident flow for triage, mitigation, communication, recovery, and follow-up work.

flow-release-readiness.title: Release Readiness Flow
flow-release-readiness.description: A rollout gate for checking scope, verification, data, observability, and rollback before production.

flow-ai-delivery.title: AI-Assisted Delivery Flow
flow-ai-delivery.description: A controlled delivery path for using AI agents without losing scope, privacy, tests, or human judgment.

flow-portfolio-story.title: Portfolio Story Flow
flow-portfolio-story.description: A career-proof flow for turning real engineering work into grounded CV, blog, and interview stories.

flow-react-flow-architecture-demo.title: React Flow Examples
flow-react-flow-architecture-demo.description: An interactive collection of React Flow patterns for navigation, grouping, layout, whiteboarding, and software architecture.

flow-react-flow-system-blueprint.title: System Design Blueprint
flow-react-flow-system-blueprint.description: A detailed system map covering DNS, edge policy, load balancing, storage, media processing, queues, and fan-out services.

welcome.lead: I keep the practical parts of my engineering work here: setup notes, reusable AI instructions, delivery checklists, and visual system maps.
welcome.note: Choose the page that matches the job, check the source material, and finish with a useful decision, checklist, diagram, or verified change.

flow-react-flow-system-blueprint.detail: A detailed map of DNS, runtime, storage, media processing, and fan-out.

flows.emptyDescription: Published flows will appear here when they are ready.
flows.menuDetail: Reusable paths for system design, production delivery, AI-assisted engineering, and portfolio writing.
flows.chartHint: Read from left to right. Each node marks an action or decision, with evidence and output kept nearby.
flows.noSelection: Select a node or edge to inspect it.
flows.temporaryAnnotation: Temporary annotation for this Studio session.
flows.boardSandbox: Your edits stay in this browser session. Undo or reset them at any time; the source diagram is unchanged.

aiSetup.commandRunbookDetail: Commands to verify before using them on a new machine.
aiSetup.aiWorkflowDetail: A simple path from source material to a checked, reusable result.

aiSkills.emptyTitle: No AI skills are available yet
aiSkills.emptyDescription: Published skills will appear here when they are ready.
aiSkills.skillLibraryDetail: Reusable instructions you can copy into an AI work session.
aiSkills.copyBehaviorDetail: The button copies the complete markdown instruction, including its process, expected output, and guardrails.
aiSkills.operatingRuleDetail: Use the instruction as a starting point. Keep the task boundaries, source material, and final judgment explicit.

checklists.emptyDescription: Published checklists will appear here when they are ready.
checklists.menuDetail: Step-by-step checks from task intake through release and rollout.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Theme, font, and layout for this Studio workspace.
preferences.pageLayoutHelp: Centered is easier to read. Full width gives diagrams and workspaces more room.
preferences.navbarHelp: Sticky keeps the controls visible. Scroll moves them with the page.
preferences.sidebarStyleHelp: Choose how closely the navigation sits beside the workspace.
preferences.collapseModeHelp: Icon leaves a narrow navigation rail. Offcanvas hides the sidebar completely on desktop.
